reasoning: The control SI-4 (14) focuses on wireless intrusion detection, which is a network security measure specific to wireless networks. Kubernetes does not inherently manage wireless network security as it operates at the application and container orchestration level. Wireless intrusion detection is typically handled by network infrastructure and security tools outside the scope of Kubernetes. Therefore, there are no direct Kubernetes security controls or configurations that map to this specific requirement.
title: System Monitoring | Wireless Intrusion Detection
